rewritten_requirements: The system shall allow users to fill in their personal medical history if it is missing, and then check and save the information.

The system shall provide users with the ability to view their medical history, receive reminders for medication, receive reminders for medicine restocking, schedule appointments, use an emergency button, write and view medical notes.
The system shall allow users to update their medical history if they choose to do so after viewing it.
The system shall allow users to update their medical notes if they choose to do so after viewing them.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: If it is not, they fill in their personal medical history, and the information is checked and saved.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If it is not, they fill in their personal medical history, and the information is checked and saved.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: They can view their medical history, get reminders to take medicines on time, get reminders to buy medicines when they are not in stock, schedule appointments, use the emergency button, write medical notes, or view medical notes.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: They can view their medical history, get reminders to take medicines on time, get reminders to buy medicines when they are not in stock, schedule appointments, use the emergency button, write medical notes, or view medical notes.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: If they view their medical history, they may choose to update it.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If they view their medical history, they may choose to update it.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: If they view their medical notes, they may also choose to update them.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If they view their medical notes, they may also choose to update them.
